honest_scope: These are CANDIDATE intermediate-fidelity bridges between the BCR4BP HALO mu_sun-continuation family (#304 Phase 3) and existing catalogue rows. A period match alone, with TOPOLOGY MISMATCH (e.g. row planar / family halo) is reported as such -- a period coincidence is not a bridge when the IC topology disagrees.
